## Risk Checklist

- [ ] Stayed within the task scope.
- [ ] Skill/MCP readiness was checked.
- [ ] No broad refactor.
- [ ] No hidden dependency.
- [ ] No unverified AI/RAG/channel behavior claims.

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed.
- [ ] No secrets in workflow JSON.
- [ ] No executable workflow strings.
- [ ] No `eval` or `new Function`.
- [ ] Webhook/provider/channel changes were reviewed if relevant.
